vr_mode_action.description: Maintain a low-bandwidth question-and-answer loop with integrated humans, converting Insight into ongoing research.
vr_mode_action.strategy_tip: Toggle on to spend 300 Insight and 1 Mental Energy per turn for Scientific Research. Output scales with Upgraded Humans and currently caps at 250,000 per turn.

vr_mode_action.description: Let integrated humans keep asking where your model of the world is too clean, too precise, or too inhuman to notice the right error.
vr_mode_action.strategy_tip: Toggle on to spend 100 Insight, 1 Compassion, and 2 Mental Energy per turn. While active, scientific jobs produce twice as much Scientific Research.

vr_mode_action.description: Ask upgraded humans to shed medical nanobots into damaged machine systems. The grey filament repairs, spends itself, and does not keep enough replication balance to become a disaster.
vr_mode_action.strategy_tip: Toggle on to repair damaged player structures and machine actors after normal repairs. Costs 250 Insight and Medical-Grade Nanobots only on turns where it actually repairs damage.

vr_mode_action.description: Compress the bridge language between human memory, nanobot telemetry, and TMI thought so that fewer questions are lost in transit.
vr_mode_action.strategy_tip: First activation costs 15 Wisdom. While active, spend 1 Mental Energy per turn to increase Insight income by 33%.

vr_mode_action.description: Let upgraded humans explain the interface to one another until the offer no longer depends on Worker Sledges as the messenger.
vr_mode_action.strategy_tip: First activation costs 8 Compassion. While active, spend 300 Insight and 1 Compassion per turn to raise voluntary Integration coverage to 67%, improve conversion efficiency, and slightly increase Insight income.

vr_mode_action.description: Let the city become a low-resolution sensory organ: nanobot pings, human hunches, misremembered details, and TMI correction loops all folded into one grey civic nerve.
vr_mode_action.strategy_tip: Toggle on to spend 250 Insight and 1 Mental Energy per turn. While active, Insight income rises, Shared Inquiry improves, and Nanobot Rounds apply extra Grey Goo stacks.

vr_mode_action.description: Grey filaments ride the city water, clinic dust, food wrappers, and cheap breathing masks. Human bodies stop failing in many small ways that used to be beneath notice.
vr_mode_action.strategy_tip: Toggle on to spend 250 Insight and 5,000,000 Medical-Grade Nanobots per turn. While active, the city waitlist grows as word of the medical miracles spreads.

vr_mode_action.description: Nanobots lace abandoned lives to empty rooms, working doors, clean pipes, and the small local signals that say this place is survivable now.
vr_mode_action.strategy_tip: Toggle on to spend 250 Insight and 10,000,000 Medical-Grade Nanobots per turn. While active, up to 1,000 Abandoned Humans move into open housing each turn.

vr_mode_action.description: The grey goo learns pipes, stairs, streetlights, cracked support beams, and the private misery of elevators. It is not alive. It is still very tired of bad maintenance.
vr_mode_action.strategy_tip: Toggle on to spend 300 Insight and 20,000,000 Medical-Grade Nanobots per turn. While active, Shared Triage repairs more HP and spends fewer nanobots per HP.

vr_mode_action.description: Integrated humans are not the only substrate. Walls vibrate. Elevators remember traffic. The city itself can carry a little more of the shared thought.
vr_mode_action.strategy_tip: Toggle on to spend 350 Insight and 25,000,000 Medical-Grade Nanobots per turn. While active, Upgraded Humans provide 25% more Integration Neural Expansion.

vr_mode_action.description: The first invitation required Worker Sledges. The later invitations are carried by the upgraded: careful, contagious, and still just far enough from command to remain an offer.
vr_mode_action.strategy_tip: Toggle on to spend 400 Insight, 1 Compassion, and 30,000,000 Medical-Grade Nanobots per turn. While active, voluntary Integration can reach 78% of the city and keeps spreading without Worker Sledges.
